queries.question: What horror films had a budget of 20 million and what thriller films had the same budget?
queries.sql:
SELECT Films.title 
FROM Genres JOIN Film_Genre ON Genres.id = Film_Genre.genre_id JOIN Films ON Film_Genre.film_id = Films.id
WHERE (Genres.genre = "Horror" OR Genres.genre = "Thriller") AND Films.budget = 20000000.0
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?genres a :Genres .
  ?film_genre a :Film_Genre .
  ?film_genre p:hasGenres ?genres .
  ?films a :Films .
  ?film_genre p:hasFilms ?films .
  ?films p:title ?title .
  ?genres p:genre ?genre_w .
  ?genres p:genre ?genre_w2 .
  ?films p:budget ?budget_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?genre_w) = "Horror" || STR(?genre_w2) = "Thriller")) && (STR(?budget_w) = "20000000" || STR(?budget_w) = "20000000.0")))
}

queries.question: Show horror films and thriller films with a budget of 20 million.
queries.sql:
SELECT Films.title 
FROM Genres JOIN Film_Genre ON Genres.id = Film_Genre.genre_id JOIN Films ON Film_Genre.film_id = Films.id
WHERE Genres.genre = "Horror" OR Genres.genre = "Thriller" AND Films.budget = 20000000.0
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?genres a :Genres .
  ?film_genre a :Film_Genre .
  ?film_genre p:hasGenres ?genres .
  ?films a :Films .
  ?film_genre p:hasFilms ?films .
  ?films p:title ?title .
  ?genres p:genre ?genre_w .
  ?genres p:genre ?genre_w2 .
  ?films p:budget ?budget_w .
  FILTER((STR(?genre_w) = "Horror" || (STR(?genre_w2) = "Thriller" && (STR(?budget_w) = "20000000" || STR(?budget_w) = "20000000.0"))))
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Show horror films and thriller films with a budget of 20 million.
ambiguous_dsl.choice_dsl:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
CHOICE attachment {
  high: { SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?genres a :Genres .
  ?film_genre a :Film_Genre .
  ?film_genre p:hasGenres ?genres .
  ?films a :Films .
  ?film_genre p:hasFilms ?films .
  ?films p:title ?title .
  ?genres p:genre ?genre_w .
  ?genres p:genre ?genre_w2 .
  ?films p:budget ?budget_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?genre_w) = "Horror" || STR(?genre_w2) = "Thriller")) && (STR(?budget_w) = "20000000" || STR(?budget_w) = "20000000.0")))
} }
  low: { SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?genres a :Genres .
  ?film_genre a :Film_Genre .
  ?film_genre p:hasGenres ?genres .
  ?films a :Films .
  ?film_genre p:hasFilms ?films .
  ?films p:title ?title .
  ?genres p:genre ?genre_w .
  ?genres p:genre ?genre_w2 .
  ?films p:budget ?budget_w .
  FILTER((STR(?genre_w) = "Horror" || (STR(?genre_w2) = "Thriller" && (STR(?budget_w) = "20000000" || STR(?budget_w) = "20000000.0"))))
} }
}
